schema.name: FortyTwoCrunchAPIProtectionV2_CL
schema.description: 42Crunch API Firewall log events. Contains API request/response telemetry including source IP, URI paths, HTTP status codes, JWT validation errors, and security policy enforcement results.

columns.name: Uuid
columns.description: Unique identifier (UUID) for the log event

columns.name: Timestamp
columns.description: Timestamp of the API request recorded by the 42Crunch firewall

columns.name: InstanceName
columns.description: Name of the 42Crunch API Firewall instance that processed the request

columns.name: Hostname
columns.description: Hostname of the API server receiving the request

columns.name: SourceIp
columns.description: Source IP address of the API client

columns.name: SourcePort
columns.description: Source port number of the API client connection

columns.name: DestinationPort
columns.description: Destination port number on the API server

columns.name: UriPath
columns.description: URI path of the API request

columns.name: Query
columns.description: Query string parameters of the API request

columns.name: Status
columns.description: HTTP response status code returned by the API firewall (e.g., 200, 401, 429, 500)

columns.name: ErrorMessage
columns.description: Error message returned by the API firewall when the request is blocked or fails validation

columns.name: Errors
columns.description: Detailed error information in JSON format from the API firewall

columns.name: RequestHeader
columns.description: HTTP request headers in JSON format

columns.name: ResponseHeader
columns.description: HTTP response headers in JSON format

columns.name: ApiId
columns.description: Unique identifier of the API definition in the 42Crunch platform

columns.name: NonBlockingMode
columns.description: Indicates whether the 42Crunch firewall is running in non-blocking (observation) mode. True means requests are logged but not blocked.

columns.name: EventType
columns.description: Type of the log event recorded by the API firewall (e.g., request, block, error)
